options.name: -dontDelDanglingPort
options.description: This option has no parameters and can be used if user don not want remove dangling ports created by this command. Default value is off

options.name: -instPrefix
options.description: Specify the feedthrough buffer prefix name. All buffers with this prefix will be removed.

options.name: -non_preferred_keep_nets
options.description: <netNamePattern> Specify the non-preferred keep net name pattern, the net driving or driven by the non-preferred net will be drigarded by buffer deletion

options.name: -preferred_keep_nets
options.description: Specify the preferred keep net name pattern, the net driving or driven by the preferred net will be used by buffer deletion
